ksa_text: Skill in building and presenting AI proof-of-concept demonstrations to executive audiences, communicating capability, limitations, and path to production.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-S-018 (AI, Skill) maps to Financial Risk Specialist scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.5212 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.521, eu_ai_act=0.488, dcwf=0.430. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within financial risk analytics, quantitative risk modeling, and data-driven risk assessment.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: weak fit domain KSA AI-S-018 with composite 0.5212 was preliminarily included, but the KSA text contains no direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency requires this to be re-examined against ANL scope.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.5212 above the weak_fit threshold of 0.52 but absence of analytics terminology in the AI domain text means the signal is framework-incidental rather than role-specific. Exclusion is more internally consistent with ANL scope definition.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include overturned. AI domain KSA with no analytics text signals at composite 0.5212 does not survive internal consistency review. Revised to exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AI-domain KSA AI-S-018 (composite 0.5212) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.5212 for AI domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act practitioner obligations; AI-adjacent competencies appear in senior analytics IC roles at awareness level only. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Financial Risk Specialist at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AI domain KSA at composite 0.5212 is not a standard requirement for Financial Risk Specialist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.5212, domain AI. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
